tests.name: preserves-all-rooms
tests.given: scrape contains 7 room or offer records
tests.expect: canonical.sections.rooms.length === 7

tests.name: preserves-all-services
tests.given: scrape contains 9 service records
tests.expect: canonical.sections.services.length === 9

tests.name: preserves-all-faqs
tests.given: scrape contains 18 FAQs
tests.expect: canonical.sections.faqs.length === 18

tests.name: dedupes-images-without-discarding-unique-images
tests.given: scrape contains duplicate image URLs and 14 unique image URLs
tests.expect: canonical.assets.images has 14 unique URLs

tests.name: keeps-source-evidence-for-each-item
tests.given: scraped text is mapped to a room, service, FAQ, and testimonial
tests.expect: each mapped item has sourceEvidenceId or equivalent trace

tests.name: centres-single-feature-card
tests.given: 1 feature card
tests.expect: feature grid renders one centred card and no empty placeholders

tests.name: uses-three-columns-for-three-feature-cards
tests.given: 3 feature cards
tests.expect: feature grid renders three balanced cards

tests.name: uses-carousel-for-many-testimonials
tests.given: 11 testimonials
tests.expect: all 11 testimonials are accessible through carousel slides

tests.name: uses-carousel-with-thumbnails-for-large-gallery
tests.given: 23 gallery images
tests.expect: no giant image wall; all 23 images accessible

tests.name: extends-room-grid-with-additional-rows
tests.given: 8 rooms
tests.expect: all 8 rooms render or are accessible through room detail controls

tests.name: hides-nav-items-without-sections
tests.given: template nav includes FAQ but canonical content has no FAQs
tests.expect: FAQ nav item is hidden or disabled

tests.name: anchors-all-visible-nav-items
tests.given: template nav has About, Gallery, Contact
tests.expect: each nav item scrolls to an element in the preview document

tests.name: template-switch-preserves-canonical-content
tests.given: user switches from original to focus to editorial
tests.expect: canonical content counts remain unchanged

tests.name: selected-template-becomes-live-template
tests.given: user selects editorial and clicks publish
tests.expect: liveSite.liveTemplateId === 'editorial'

tests.name: live-site-uses-selected-snapshot
tests.given: published site is opened from dashboard
tests.expect: rendered site uses liveSnapshotId and not mutable preview draft

tests.name: preview-form-does-not-submit-live-booking
tests.given: user submits booking form in preview mode
tests.expect: preview-only message is shown and no live booking is created

tests.name: mobile-preview-renders-mobile-css
tests.given: device mode mobile
tests.expect: site renders at mobile viewport width, not a shrunken desktop

tests.name: tablet-preview-renders-tablet-css
tests.given: device mode tablet
tests.expect: site renders at tablet viewport width

tests.name: device-selection-persists-across-template-switch
tests.given: user selects tablet then switches templates
tests.expect: new template remains in tablet preview

tests.name: global-tone-rewrite-preserves-counts
tests.given: AI prompt: Make this more premium
tests.expect: room, service, image, testimonial, FAQ, contact, and pricing counts remain unchanged

tests.name: seo-rewrite-preserves-source-evidence
tests.given: AI prompt: Rewrite everything for SEO
tests.expect: source evidence IDs remain attached to canonical content items

tests.name: image-replacement-keeps-section-destinations
tests.given: AI prompt: Replace all images with brighter images
tests.expect: each section that previously had an image still has an image or image suggestion
